signals.npcLine: Markets flicker under shadow; assets bleed in digital night.
signals.questPulse: Scan cryptic exchanges; uncover rogue coin movements.
signals.worldFeed: Global credits slip; fear grips cyber bazaars.
signals.clueEvent: Unusual volume spike detected on unstable tokens.

signals.npcLine: Whispers say BTC holdouts plan underground trade runs.
signals.questPulse: Intercept encrypted BTC channels; prey on weak chains.
signals.worldFeed: Silent operations crowd the blockchain undercurrent.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted BTC nodes flash abnormal bursts.

signals.npcLine: RAVE token pulses faintly—rumors of a crash brewing.
signals.questPulse: Trace RAVE’s origin; locate source of instability.
signals.worldFeed: Minor coin's tremors ripple across shadow markets.
signals.clueEvent: RAVE token volume drops suspiciously fast.

signals.npcLine: Dangerous run on OVPP vaults; hackers scramble for control.
signals.questPulse: Infiltrate vaults; secure OVPP assets before collapse.
signals.worldFeed: OVPP nodes under siege, digital defenses weakening.
signals.clueEvent: Multiple failed login attempts on OVPP storages.

signals.npcLine: HYPE buzz fizzles; street traders eye next big surge.
signals.questPulse: Eavesdrop on dealers; predict HYPE’s next jump.
signals.worldFeed: HYPE chatter fills neon-lit alleys, tense and thin.
signals.clueEvent: Sudden social media silence around HYPE token.
